﻿fine_cloth_guild = {
	is_foreign = no
	pop_type = burghers
	max_levels = fine_cloth_guild_max_level
	
	category = consumer_goods_category
	
	employment_size = guild_employment
	
	town = yes
	city = yes
	megalopolis = yes

	

	build_time = guild_build_time
	
	unique_production_methods = {
		fine_cloth_guild_maintenance = {
			cloth = 0.8
			produced = fine_cloth
			output = 0.525

			
			category = guild_input
		}

		wool_weavers_maintenance = {
			wool = 1.0
			
			produced = fine_cloth
			output = 0.525

			
			category = guild_input
		}

		silk_weavers_maintenance = {
			silk = 0.8
			
			produced = fine_cloth
			output = 0.735

			
			category = guild_input
			debug_max_profit = 0.35	# its ok to be a bit better..
		}

		spanish_cloth_maintenance = {
			allow = {
				custom_tooltip = {
					text = has_unlocked_spanish_cloth_industry
					has_variable = spanish_cloth_industry
				}
			}
			wool = 0.8
			
			produced = fine_cloth
			output = 0.525

			
			category = guild_input
			debug_max_profit = 0.5
		}
	}

	unique_production_methods = {
		base_fine_cloth_guild_maintenance = {
			produced = fine_cloth
			dyes = 0.14
			output = 0.105


			category = guild_input

			debug_max_profit = 0.1		#improvement
		}

		alum_fine_cloth_guild_maintenance = {
			alum = 0.05
			dyes = 0.2
			produced = fine_cloth
			output = 0.21


			category = guild_input
		}

		fur_trim_guild_maintenance = {
			fur = 0.5
			produced = fine_cloth
			output = 0.21


			debug_max_profit = 0.2
			category = guild_input
		}

	}

	custom_tags = { guild }
	construction_demand = guild_construction

}

	}

			produced = fine_cloth

			produced = fine_cloth

			produced = fine_cloth

			category = guild_input
			debug_max_profit = 0.3
		}
	}
